evals.prompt: Generate ChatGPT app submission materials for our public travel-planning app. It has search and save-trip tools, OAuth login, and a React widget.
evals.expected_output: Submission-ready app metadata, tool coverage, positive and negative test cases, and explicit privacy/CSP review findings.

evals.prompt: Audit our existing Apps SDK app before directory submission, especially its tool wording and handling of user location data.
evals.expected_output: A source-backed submission audit that flags sensitive-data, tool-description, and policy gaps with practical remediation steps.
